description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior features large, floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides, allowing for ample natural light and modern visual appeal. The front entrance is accentuated by a small porch with steps and decorative plants, leading into a spacious open-plan living area. Interior spaces are divided into distinct rooms, including bedrooms, a kitchen, a living room, and bathrooms, all visible through the transparent window walls. The color palette is primarily neutral, with beige walls, white trim, and black window frames. The overall design is modern and open, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with large floor-to-ceiling windows, a flat roof, and a small front porch. The layout is open and functional, with neutral colors and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small porch, and large windows spanning the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open-plan interior, kitchen area, and additional windows along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more large windows, the living area, and the back rooms of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing bedrooms, interior partitions, and the side porch area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides
